title: systests: kube: bump up a timeout
body:
PR #22821 (CI speedup) was overly aggressive in one kube test.
It's flaking. Bump up timeout from 3s to 4.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
List of flakes so far

* fedora-39 : sys podman fedora-39 root host boltdb
  * PR #23020
    * [06-18 15:02](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5661137650319360/html/sys-podman-fedora-39-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--00657) in [sys] [700] podman kube play --wait with siginterrupt
* fedora-40 : sys podman fedora-40 rootless host sqlite
  * PR #22957
    * [06-11 07:05](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4627060285505536/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00646) in [sys] [700] podman kube play --wait with siginterrupt
* fedora-40 : sys remote fedora-40 rootless host sqlite [remote]
  * PR #22425
    * [06-11 08:51](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4882400621101056/html/sys-remote-fedora-40-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00645) in [sys] [700] podman kube play --wait with siginterrupt
* fedora-40-aarch64 : sys podman fedora-40-aarch64 root host sqlite
  * PR #22868
    * [06-01 00:01](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6581099277582336/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-aarch64-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00645) in [sys] [700] podman kube play --wait with siginterrupt
* rawhide : sys podman rawhide rootless host sqlite
  * PR #22425
    * [06-11 09:10](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6571250481364992/html/sys-podman-rawhide-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00645) in [sys] [700] podman kube play --wait with siginterrupt
